chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.S-164 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag (A) 2. For orders on CMA No.519/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.520/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 21-7-2025 Mst. Shahida Bhutto, Petitioner / Advocate in person.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- I have heard the petitioner in person at some length and have also perused the order dated 30.06.2025, pertaining to the maintainability of the above noted petition. The petitioner after being confronted, submits that she shall be satisfied if the learned Family Court is directed to ensure compliance with the order dated 21.05.2025, passed in Family Appeal No. 10/2025, within the time stipulated therein and in accordance with its terms. Ordered accordingly. In view of the above, the instant Constitutional Petition stands disposed of, along with the listed applications. J U D G E Naveed Ali
